name: Evie Mesh Floor Lamp - LIT4199 - Gold - Safavieh
description: Introducing the evie mesh floor lamp, standing at 58.25 inches with a radiant gold finish that captures timeless elegance. Crafted from sturdy iron and steel, this lamp adds a touch of sophistication to any room. Its intricate mesh design beautifully diffuses light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The sleek silhouette effortlessly complements various decor styles, from modern to classic. Whether you choose to place it beside your favorite reading chair or in a cozy corner, the evie mesh floor lamp will illuminate your space with style and grace. Elevate your home lighting experience with this striking piece that combines form and function seamlessly.
